CreateTbsp.clientToken: Idempotency token, no more than 64 characters
CreateTbsp.name: Name of the DDoS Enhanced Protection Package
CreateTbsp.lineType: Line type (BGP/BGP_S, representing Standard BGP/Enhanced BGP respectively)
CreateTbsp.reservationLength: Purchase duration (by day: 1-20; by month: 3 or 6; by year: 1-3)
CreateTbsp.autoRenewTime: Auto-renewal cycle, enabled upon TBSP creation (by month: 1-9; by year: 1-3)
CreateTbsp.autoRenewTimeUnit: Auto-renewal cycle unit, enabled upon TBSP creation (MONTH/YEAR)
